title: Azure Migration Lead required for legacy infrastructure programme
snippet: Arden Manufacturing is seeking an Azure Migration Lead to support a migration from legacy on-premise systems to Microsoft Azure.

title: SQL Server performance and database resilience support
snippet: The organisation is requesting database support for SQL Server performance, high availability, and disaster recovery readiness.

title: Retail group starts Power BI reporting transformation
snippet: Marlow Retail Systems has started a reporting modernisation programme and is looking to improve Power BI dashboards across operations.

title: Care provider launches data governance review
snippet: Cavendish Care Services announced a data governance and data maturity review to improve reporting, compliance, and operational insight.

title: Oracle Fusion ERP support consultant
snippet: Orchid Logistics is hiring for Oracle Fusion ERP support and integration work across finance and operations systems.
